content: PDF: WeasyPrint 69.0 (2026-06-02) renders HTML+CSS; needs system libs (pango, harfbuzz, gdk-pixbuf) -- available on Fedora but heavy for a pip-installed CLI. ReportLab 5.0.0 (2026-06-18) pure Python since 4.0 but is programmatic layout: no markdown/HTML rendering, so a report renderer would be significant hand-written code. Recommendation: optional extra sift[pdf] = markdown->HTML (python 'markdown') -> WeasyPrint; defer to late milestone.
